testcase.name: test_fit_request_creates_service_desk_ticket
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sev1_unified_flow.py:236: in test_fit_request_creates_service_desk_ticket print(f"✅ Fit service desk ticket created: {request_id}") ^^^^^^^^^^ E NameError: name 'request_id' is not defined

testcase.name: test_notifications_have_read_field

failure.message: AssertionError: Notification NOTIF-8D21DF5B missing 'read' field assert 'read' in {'action_url': '/admin/concierge?request=conc-24621862', 'concierge_request_id': 'conc-24621862', 'created_at': '2026-01-29T13:04:35.838000', 'customer': {'email': 'inbox_test_623239@test.com', 'name': 'Inbox Test c536', 'phone': '9876543213'}, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sev1_unified_flow.py:310: in test_notifications_have_read_field assert "read" in notif, f"Notification {notif.get('id')} missing 'read' field" E AssertionError: Notification NOTIF-8D21DF5B missing 'read' field E assert 'read' in {'action_url': '/admin/concierge?request=conc-24621862', 'concierge_request_id': 'conc-24621862', 'created_at': '2026-01-29T13:04:35.838000', 'customer': {'email': 'inbox_test_623239@test.com', 'name': 'Inbox Test c536', 'phone': '9876543213'}, ...}
